title: 蓝电线
description:
A high contrast redstone wire, which is easy to observe and protects the eyes, is charged red and uncharged blue.
一个高对比度的红石线，利于观察护眼，充能红色，不充能蓝色。
body:
A high contrast redstone wire, which is easy to observe and protects the eyes, is charged red and uncharged blue.

一个高对比度的红石线，利于观察护眼，充能红色，不充能蓝色。
